system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

With a mere touch, your foes’ body turns to cold stone. Make an Arm Strike roll against the Parry of 1 target per Rank of Neigong. On a Success any targets you strike who are Qi level 2 or lower turn to stone for 1 Round per Rank of your Qi. Cathartic: On a Cathartic use of this Technique the transformation is often fatal and the Technique works on anyone Qi level 5 or lower. The effect still lasts for 1 round per Rank of Qi, but each round the frozen targets take 3d10 Open Damage, crumbling to dust if they are reduced to 0 health.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Qi 2 or lower targets turn to cold stone for 1 round per Rank of user's Qi
system.catharticTargetEffects: Qi 5 or lower targets turn to cold stone for 1 round per Rank of user's Qi and take 3d10 Open Damage each round
system.catharticEffect: On a Cathartic use of this Technique the transformation is often fatal and the Technique works on anyone Qi level 5 or lower. The effect still lasts for 1 round per Rank of Qi, but each round the frozen targets take 3d10 Open Damage, crumbling to dust if they are reduced to 0 health.
